{{Quote|Spacious rooms, quiet surroundings and pleasant service mark this three-star establishment, the most popular inn in town.|Tatooine Visitors Bureau brochure|<ref name="Technical Journal">''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]''</ref>}}
The '''Spaceport Hotel''' was a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] established in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]; it had a reputation as being somewhat less than mediocre for a standard planet, but above average for Mos Eisley.<ref name="Technical Journal" /> The hotel boasted forty rooms available, and each room cost approximately fifteen [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for a one-night stay. The rooms were small but adequate and the majority of them had working air conditioning and sonic showers. A [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] was known to work there as a clerk.<ref name="GG7" />

{{Loc-stub}}
